name: Section 271(1)(c) Penalty Notice Analysis
description: Extracts key data from Income Tax Section 271(1)(c) penalty notices for drafting a formal reply.

checks.focus: Extract assessment year and penalty amount proposed
checks.rule: Identify the assessment year and the exact penalty amount proposed under Section 271(1)(c).

checks.focus: Identify the limb — concealment of income or furnishing inaccurate particulars
checks.rule: Determine whether the penalty is proposed for concealment of income or furnishing inaccurate particulars of income. Both limbs must not be struck simultaneously (Dilip Shroff principle).
Identify the specific amount of income that has been concealed or the inaccurate particulars furnished, as alleged in the notice.

checks.focus: Extract taxpayer PAN and AO details
checks.rule: Extract PAN, taxpayer name, and the Assessing Officer's designation who has initiated penalty proceedings.

checks.focus: Extract response deadline and hearing date
checks.rule: Identify the deadline to submit written reply and the date fixed for personal hearing.
